slides.headline: She's ringing three electricians. Right now.
slides.body: Same job. Same money. One winner. Swipe.

slides.headline: Electrician one: rings out.
slides.body: Up a ladder, phone in the van. The usual.

slides.headline: Electrician two: voicemail.
slides.body: 'Leave a message after the tone.' She doesn't. Nobody does.

slides.headline: Electrician three: answered in 2 rings.
slides.body: Quote booked for Thursday, deposit taken, confirmation text sent. Done in 90 seconds.

slides.label: that's how long it took for the job to be gone

slides.headline: First to answer wins the job. Always has.
You don't have to be cheaper. Or better. Or faster on site.
slides.body: You just have to pick up first. CaillteAI makes you the third electrician — on every call.

slides.headline: How often are you electrician one?
slides.body: Free 60-second missed-call audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this for the next 'I'll ring them back'
